text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 U.S. President Trump said Iran would have had a nuclear weapon within one month, perhaps two weeks, and would have used it on Israel, the Middle East and the United States. He added that Qatar, Saudi Arabia and the UAE were shocked when they were hit. “We stopped them” from taking over the Middle East, he said. @wfwitness

🇷🇺 🇦🇿 The Ministries of Foreign Affairs of Russia and Azerbaijan state that they have reached a settlement on the consequences of the plane crash in December 2024, which soured relations between the two countries. They agreed that the cause of the crash was an "unintentional action of air defense" over Chechnya. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness ⚡️ 🇹🇷 Kahramanmaraş Governor Mükerrem Ünlüer stated that least four people have been killed – one teacher and three students – and 20 wounded after an eighth‑grade student opened fire in two classrooms at a school in Kahramanmaraş. The attacker also died. Authorities believe he arrived with five guns and seven magazines. @wfwitness

⚡️ 🇹🇷 At least four people have been killed and 20 others wounded in a shooting at a school in the city of Kahramanmaraş, southern Turkey. It is the second consecutive day of deadly gun violence at a school in the country. @wfwitness

⚡️ 🇹🇷 Reports of an armed attack was carried out at a school in Kahramanmaraş, at least six people were injured in the incident. Authorities are investigating the circumstances of the attack as more details are expected. @wfwitness

↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇮🇷🇺🇸 The United States and Iran have reached a “principle agreement” to extend their current ceasefire until April 22 to continue negotiations, according to the Associated Press, citing sources. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | Socials | Donate | Advertising" 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 The Iranian Foreign Ministry representative did not confirm media reports about an agreement with the US to extend the ceasefire. The US must prove the seriousness of its intentions to end hostilities. They have repeatedly disrupted the negotiation process, the Iranian Foreign Ministry stated. The Iranian Foreign Ministry stated that the date of the second round of negotiations with the US has not been scheduled yet, and called the views put forward by the US during the first round of negotiations in Pakistan unreasonable and unrealistic. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
🇬🇧 🇺🇸 ⚡️ Starmer to Trump: “I Will NOT Yield!” UK Refuses to Join Iran War Despite UK-US Trade Deal Threat

⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇬🇧 🇮🇷 🇷🇺 US President Trump posts a headline from The Sun on TruthSocial: The report by defence editor Jerome Starkey argues that Prime Minister Keir Starmer’s rhetoric on defence is not matched by Britain’s military capabilities. The piece highlights concerns over reduced manpower, ageing equipment, and delays in defence investment, warning the UK is not prepared for major conflicts involving countries like Iran or Russia. It concludes that “words don’t win wars,” stressing the need for concrete military readiness amid rising global tensions. @wfwitness

↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸 Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesman Esmaeil Baghaei said no mediator other than Pakistan is being considered between Iran and the United States. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesman Esmaeil Baghaei said the release of frozen Iranian assets is not a concession but a right that has been violated. “It is as if a thief takes your property and then offers to return it as a favour,” he stated. No final agreement was reached on this or other issues in Islamabad. @wfwitness
Trump: Why are we spending hundreds of billions of dollars a year on NATO if they’re not going to be with us?

🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇨🇳 Trump posts on Truth Social: China is very happy that I am permanently opening the Strait of Hormuz. I am doing it for them, also - And the World. This situation will never happen again. They have agreed not to send weapons to Iran. President Xi will give me a big, fat, hug when I get there in a few weeks. We are working together smartly, and very well! Doesn’t that beat fighting??? BUT REMEMBER, we are very good at fighting, if we have to - far better than anyone else!!! President DJT

He warned that indifference and inaction against wrong acts will eventually affect everyone. The Pope had only called for peace and condemned the unjust war against Iran; the fact that Americans cannot tolerate even a religious leader’s request for peace shows that if the international community does not respond to continued lawlessness, consequences will follow. @wfwitness

↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸 Iran’s Foreign Ministry spokesman, Esmail Baqaei, said the other side ignored part of the understanding regarding the ceasefire from the start and broke its promises, but that does not mean Iran will retreat. The issue was pursued seriously in Islamabad…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇪🇺 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Iran’s Foreign Ministry spokesman said Tehran is pleased that many European countries have avoided the trap set by the United States and Israel regarding the Strait of Hormuz. He added that Iran has been the guardian of security in the waterway for decades, and that any outside intervention only complicates matters. “Iran, with the help of regional coastal countries, can fully handle the security and safety of this waterway, provided that US aggression and the imposed war in the region come to an end,” he said. @wfwitness
